turns.content: My son is 19 and wants to backpack across Southeast Asia alone. I told him absolutely not, it's too dangerous.
That's understandable worry. What specific dangers concern you most?
Everything. Crime, disease, getting lost. He doesn't have enough life experience. I said he can go when he's 25.

notes: Overprotective parental behavior with adult child
